basic_details.job_title: CSIR NEERI Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: National Environmental Engineering Research Center (CSIR NEERI)
basic_details.short_information: National Environmental Engineering Research Center (CSIR NEERI) has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 2 Project Assistant-II Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on at the CSIR NEERI office with original documents and self-attested copies.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.details: Project Assistant-II: B.Sc. in Chemistry as one of the subject from a recognized University / Institute. Experience: Field work, data collection, sample analysis, physicochemical characteristics of soil, data compilation, and report preparation.

salary_details.details: Project Assistant-II: Rs. 20,000/- + HRA Increment of 15% after 3 years of experience in the same project.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download CSIR NEERI Project Assistant-II Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download CSIR NEERI Project Assistant-II Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CSIR NEERI Project Assistant-II Recruitment 2026 - Overview
CSIR NEERI Project Assistant-II Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CSIR NEERI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CSIR NEERI Project Assistant-II Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CSIR NEERI Project Assistant-II Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Assistant-II: B.Sc. in Chemistry as one of the subject from a recognized University / Institute. Experience: Field work, data collection, sample analysis, physicochemical characteristics of soil, data compilation, and report preparation.

rows.category: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Project Assistant-II: Rs. 20,000/- + HRA Increment of 15% after 3 years of experience in the same project.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: CSIR NEERI Project Assistant-II Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CSIR NEERI Project Assistant-II posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Assistant-II posts at CSIR NEERI is scheduled for 24th July 2026. Candidates should report between 09:30 AM and 11:00 AM.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Project Assistant-II position?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a B.Sc. in Chemistry as one of the subjects from a recognized University or Institute.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant-II role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Assistant-II position is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant-II post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 20,000/- plus House Rent Allowance (HRA). An increment of 15% is applicable after 3 years of experience.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant-II position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Project Assistant-II post at CSIR NEERI.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry a passport-size photo, Aadhaar card, 10th, 12th, and Graduate marksheets and degrees, along with a filled application form and one set of photocopies.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the reporting time for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to report for the walk-in interview between 09:30 AM and 11:00 AM on the interview date.

faq.question: Q10. What kind of experience is preferred for this role?
faq.answer: Experience in field work, data collection, sample analysis, physicochemical characteristics of soil, data compilation, and report preparation is preferred.
